ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "redshift" REAL /* Redshift value of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of celestial object (e.g., supernovae, stars) */,
  "code" INTEGER /* Unique code for the dataset */,
  "orig_sample" TEXT /* Original sample name */,
  "queryable" INTEGER /* Whether the dataset is queryable */,
  "last_rmag" REAL /* Last r magnitude value */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was collected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who created the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who last updated the dataset */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dataset was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "obs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the observation belongs to */,
  "obs_date" TEXT /* Date of the observation */,
  "obs_time" TEXT /* Time of the observation */,
  "obs_type" TEXT /* Type of observation (e.g., photometry, spectroscopy) */,
  "telescope" TEXT /* Telescope used for the observation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the telescope */,
  "observer" TEXT /* Name of the observer */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the observation */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the observation */,
  "instrument_settings" TEXT /* Settings of the instrument used during the observation */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("obs_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, collaborator) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the researcher account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the researcher account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the dataset was accessed */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the dataset */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the dataset */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supernovae" (
  "sn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supernova event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the supernova event belongs to */,
  "sn_type" TEXT /* Type of supernova event */,
  "sn_date" TEXT /* Date of the supernova event */,
  "sn_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the supernova event */,
  "ra" REAL /* Right ascension of the supernova */,
  "dec" REAL /* Declination of the supernova */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the supernova */,
  "host_galaxy" INTEGER /* ID of the host galaxy */,
  "spectral_type" TEXT /* Spectral type of the supernova */,
  "discovery_date" TEXT /* Date of discovery of the supernova */,
  "discovery_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the discovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supernovae_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_supernovae_host_galaxy FOREIGN KEY ("host_galaxy") REFERENCES galaxies ("galaxy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stars" (
  "star_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each star */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the star belongs to */,
  "star_type" TEXT /* Type of star */,
  "star_date" TEXT /* Date of the star observation */,
  "star_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the star */,
  "ra" REAL /* Right ascension of the star */,
  "dec" REAL /* Declination of the star */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the star */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the star */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the star */,
  "luminosity" REAL /* Luminosity of the star */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the star */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("star_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stars_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "galaxies" (
  "galaxy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each galaxy */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the galaxy belongs to */,
  "galaxy_type" TEXT /* Type of galaxy */,
  "galaxy_date" TEXT /* Date of the galaxy observation */,
  "galaxy_magnitude" REAL /* Magnitude of the galaxy */,
  "ra" REAL /* Right ascension of the galaxy */,
  "dec" REAL /* Declination of the galaxy */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance to the galaxy */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the galaxy */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the galaxy */,
  "velocity" REAL /* Velocity of the galaxy */,
  "redshift" REAL /* Redshift value of the galaxy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("galaxy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_galaxies_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "costs" (
  "cost_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the cost is associated with */,
  "cost_4m" REAL /* Cost of observing the dataset with a 4m telescope */,
  "cost_8m" REAL /* Cost of observing the dataset with an 8m telescope */,
  "telescope_type" TEXT /* Type of telescope used */,
  "observation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the observation */,
  "cost_per_hour" REAL /* Cost per hour of observation */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the observation */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the observation */,
  "grants" TEXT /* Grants associated with the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cost_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_costs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "g_values" (
  "g_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each G value entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the G value is associated with */,
  "gA" REAL /* G value A */,
  "gB" REAL /* G value B */,
  "gt0" REAL /* G value t0 */,
  "gtfall" REAL /* G value tfall */,
  "gtrise" REAL /* G value trise */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the G value measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the G value measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the G values */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the G values */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference for the G values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("g_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_g_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "r_values" (
  "r_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each R value entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the R value is associated with */,
  "rA" REAL /* R value A */,
  "rB" REAL /* R value B */,
  "rt0" REAL /* R value t0 */,
  "rtfall" REAL /* R value tfall */,
  "rtrise" REAL /* R value trise */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date of the R value measurement */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time of the R value measurement */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used to measure the R values */,
  "uncertainty" REAL /* Uncertainty in the R values */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference for the R values */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("r_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_r_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
